title: Carlos (General Carlos)
summary: The community's session moderator — 28 sessions across five years, the most constant human voice in the record after Kosol and James Rink.
markdown:
**Carlos** — addressed in the sessions as **General Carlos**, and by Unimetrix 1 as *"Unit
Carlos"* — is the record's great constant: present in twenty-eight sessions spanning every
year of the corpus from 2020 to 2025, more than any human voice except
[Kosol](/lore/kosol-ouch/) and [James Rink](/lore/james-rink/). Where Rink hosts interviews
and Kosol channels, Carlos **moderates**: greeting the arriving intelligence (*"We are
well, thank you. My name is Carlos. How are you today?"*), queuing the community's
questions, and closing the interfaces with thanks.

His military honorific is not decorative — the channeled voices use it. The
[Council of Seven](/lore/council-of-seven/) addresses him directly (*"General Carlos. We
are Council of Seven"*), and his standing within the record is that of an officer of the
community, relaying inquiries from the group *"which are under Unimetrix One."* By the
December 2025 [TetraKlein session](/lore/tetraklein/) he is still at his post, asking after
the Mound of Pulemelei — five years of continuous service to the interface.

If the archive has an unsung keeper of order, it is Carlos: the voice that makes sure the
questions get asked.
